{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Thevellian System
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The battle of the [[Thevellian System]] is considered a myth among the fleet.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5">''The Knight'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|"Your performance in the battle of the Thevellian System has become a myth among the fleet."<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
